title: Christmas Culinary & Decorations
description: Mod adding Christmas traditional dishes from around the world and decorations including functional presents.
body:
![Christmas Culinary Desires](https://i.imgur.com/43TYh0w.png)

Mod containing **Christmas dishes** collected from around the world and **Christmas decorations**.  
All items and blocks are **craftable using in-game vanilla resources**.

## Included Decorations and Features

- 🎁 Functional Christmas presents in multiple colors and two sizes, each with a unique interior  
- 🎄 Christmas trees divided into multiple parts for flexible color and size customization  
- ✨ Fairylights in various colors  
- 🍰 Placeable and edible Christmas dishes, sweets, and pastries inspired by traditions around the world  



## Recipes & Information

**JEI (Just Enough Items by mezz)** is recommended for viewing recipes and ensuring the best compatibility for older versions.

More information, performance tips, and all recipes are available here:  
📄 **[Christmas Culinary & Decorations Recipes](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1axU0a9bnuPWEeSuIcWWaCtB8aL9ogAjE/view?usp=sharing)**



![Christmas Culinary Desires Preview](https://i.imgur.com/UatM8R6.png)



### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted.
You may include it in modpacks or videos with proper credit.
